name: Port Wine Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 cup veal or beef brown stock
recipeInstructions:
1 Heat the port wine and cinnamon over medium heat until boiling.
2 Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes. Remove the cinnamon stick.
3 Add the veal or beef brown stock.
4 Dissolve the cornstarch in the fresh lemon juice, then stir into the wine mixture.
5 Bring the sauce to a boil, reduce the heat, and simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
6 Stir in the honey before serving. Makes 1 1/2 cups.
